race.comment: REMISSION RUN (3) was a Grade 4/5 winner (17.59) two back then found trouble in the run and fell at this track last time. Rates a top chance on best. FABIO ZED (4) hit the ground running to win over the 300m at this track two runs back then settled forward again when finishing second at this track last start. Although beaten ran one of the quickest times on the card last start. Expected to feature again. KEYLIN (1) was an effortless winner two back scoring by half a length but could manage only midfield last time when finished 6th and beaten 5.5 lengths at The Gardens (16.13). The form from her last run stacks up well. One of the better hopes. OCEAN'S PEARL (6) has strong credentials at this circuit over this journey.

runners.name: Fabio Zed
runners.owners: Hanson Hanson Synd H Hanson,T Hanson
